TRIPADVISOR.TITLE: Travelers’ Choice Best of the Best
TRIPADVISOR.DESCRIPTION: Proudly ranked among the top 1% of attractions worldwide, recognized for our exceptional private cenote experiences and commitment to excellence.

WORLD_TRAVEL_AWARDS.TITLE: World Travel Awards

GALLERY.TITLE: Step Into the Magic of the Maya Jungle and Hidden Cenotes
GALLERY.DESCRIPTION: Explore our gallery to witness the breathtaking beauty of Puerto Morelos' most exclusive cenotes. From crystal-clear waters and ancient rock formations to vibrant jungle landscapes, see the unforgettable moments that await you on our private adventures.

CHOOSE_PLAN.TITLE: Choose the Perfect Plan for Your Cenote Adventure
CHOOSE_PLAN.DESCRIPTION: We offer flexible, tailored options to match your travel style. Whether you are seeking an exclusive private journey or a premium small-group experience, enjoy the most authentic cenote tour in Puerto Morelos.

PRIVATE.DESCRIPTION: Experience an exclusive snorkeling adventure with a private boat, personalized service, and more amenities.
FEATURES: Unlimited drinks included on the boat
Vip meal: 4 tacos and 2 drinks (during lunch)

CENOTE.TITLE: Cenote adventuring
CENOTE.DESCRIPTION: Explore Cenote Adventuring Cancun: Swim, zipline, and discover Mexico’s natural wonders on our exclusive tour.

FAQS.TITLE: Prepare for Your Jungle Journey: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQS.DESCRIPTION: Everything you need to know before diving into the Maya jungle. We’ve gathered the most common questions to ensure your cenote adventure is seamless and unforgettable.

CARD_CONTACT.TITLE: Need More Information?
CARD_CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Whether it's a special request or a custom private itinerary, our team of experts is ready to help you plan the perfect experience.

FAQS.question: How many cenotes are included in the tour?
FAQS.answer: The experience typically includes visits to multiple cenotes along the Ruta de los Cenotes, depending on your selected package and preferences.

FAQS.question: Is this tour suitable for beginners?
FAQS.answer: Yes! No prior experience is needed. The tour is designed for all levels, making it one of the best things to do in Puerto Morelos for beginners.

FAQS.question: How far is Puerto Morelos from Cancun?
FAQS.answer: Puerto Morelos is located about 20–30 minutes from Cancun, making it an easy and convenient destination for a cenote tour Cancun.

FAQS.question: What should I bring for the cenote tour?
FAQS.answer: Bring swimwear, biodegradable sunscreen, a towel, and comfortable clothing. Everything else will be provided for your cenote Puerto Morelos experience.

HERO.TITLE: Ruta de los Cenotes in Puerto Morelos – A Complete Guide to Nature, Adventure & Hidden Cenotes
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Hidden just a short drive from Cancun, the Ruta de los Cenotes in Puerto Morelos is one of the most authentic experiences in the Mexican Caribbean.

WHAT_TO_EXPECT.TITLE: What to Expect: A Day in the Ruta de los Cenotes

LIST.TITLE: Ruta de los Cenotes – A Guide to Nature, Adventure & Hidden Gems
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Located just a short drive from Cancun, this peaceful jungle road offers an authentic escape into the heart of the Mexican Caribbean's natural wonders.

LIST.TITLE: Diverse Cenote Formations
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Discover a variety of Puerto Morelos cenotes, from open-air pools surrounded by lush greenery to mystical cave cenotes with dramatic rock formations.

LIST.TITLE: Immersive Water Activities
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Enjoy access to multiple cenotes where you can swim, snorkel, or simply relax in fresh, crystal-clear waters connected to the world’s largest underground river systems.

LIST.TITLE: The Charm of Puerto Morelos
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Experience the laid-back atmosphere of this coastal town, serving as the gateway to the route with its local culture, traditional food, and relaxed Caribbean vibes.

LIST.TITLE: Adventure Beyond the Beach
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Perfect for those seeking a balance of tranquility and adrenaline, with activities ranging from zip-lining and ATV rides to exploring freshwater sinkholes.

LIST.TITLE: Strategic & Easy Access
LIST.DESCRIPTION: Conveniently located between Cancun and Playa del Carmen, making it one of the best and most accessible day trips for travelers in the region.

INTRO.TITLE: Cenote Adventuring: Our Story
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_1: Cenote Adventuring was created מתוך a passion for sharing the natural beauty of Puerto Morelos and its surrounding jungle. What started as a local initiative has evolved into a premium private experience designed for travelers who want more than traditional Cancun tours.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_2: Our founders grew up exploring the ruta de los cenotes, discovering hidden cenotes and learning about their ecological and cultural importance. Over time, they realized that many visitors were missing the true essence of these природные wonders due to crowded group tours.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_3: That’s why Cenote Adventuring focuses on offering a private cenote tour Puerto Morelos, where guests can connect with nature at their own pace while enjoying personalized attention and authentic experiences.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_4: Our mission is simple: to provide meaningful and sustainable experiences in nature. We aim to connect travelers with the beauty of the ruta de los cenotes while preserving the environment for future generations.
INTRO.DESCRIPTION_5: We believe that tourism should go beyond entertainment. It should educate, inspire, and create lasting memories. That’s why every cenote Puerto Morelos tour we offer is designed with respect for nature and local culture.

OUR_STORY.TITLE: Our Story
OUR_STORY.DESCRIPTION_1: Extreme Adventuring Cancun was founded with a single purpose: to give visitors a safe, natural, and unforgettable adventure inspired by the Mayan jungle.
OUR_STORY.DESCRIPTION_2: For nearly two decades, we have designed experiences that blend ecotourism, entertainment, culture, and family-friendly adventure, always prioritizing safety, environmental respect, and the preservation of the Selva Maya.
OUR_STORY.TITLE_LIST: What started with a single tour has grown into a full ecopark that includes:
OUR_STORY.SUBTITLE_LIST: Our legacy is built on trust, innovation, and warm hospitality, serving tens of thousands of travelers every year.
LIST: A tequila tasting produced with regional heritage

OUR_PROMISE.TITLE: Our Promise
OUR_PROMISE.DESCRIPTION: We work every day with a clear purpose: “To make every day with us the best day of your vacation”, Adventure, culture, nature, and exceptional service — all in one place.
